name: neha-teaching
description: Neha's teaching tools — imaginative, mission-driven family learning workspaces.

plugins.name: sira-teach
plugins.description: Sira: a parent-operated homeschool teaching skill for preschool/elementary children, grounded in Kieran Egan's imaginative education and the Lost Tools of Learning. Turns a folder into a stateful family learning home and produces low-prep, jargon-free lessons. Provides /sira-teach.
